narrative:
Vernon Twp A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 897 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
